output.summary: sum_even correctly implements the even-sum behaviour, the empty-list case, and type rejection. One minor clarity note on the bool check; no correctness or interface issues.

findings.description: The bool exclusion is correct but non-obvious; a one-line comment would make the intent clear to future readers.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a comment noting that bool is excluded despite being an int subclass.

criteria_coverage.notes: Even integers are filtered with value % 2 == 0 and accumulated.
Empty list yields total 0 via the initial accumulator.
